notes:
• Added a folder filter to move unused files. Now you can decide if you want to move files using the Risk level and also by selecting the folders.
  • Added/changed the way restore backup files work. Now you can choose what you want to restore by selecting the folders.
  • Fixed an issue that the Analyze options are being saved on the project save file instead of globally by the software
  • Fixed an issue that the plugin files scan was not working properly when some plugin has plugin parameters that contains javascript code.
